ns0:entry.ns0:title: Rangi42/polishedcrystal

An upgrade to Pokémon Crystal. Brings features and content up to date, and adds some original content.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apple/swift-nio-ssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apple/swift-nio-ssl
Language: assembly
TLS Support for SwiftNIO, based on BoringSSL.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aws/aws-lc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aws/aws-lc
Language: assembly
AWS-LC is a general-purpose cryptographic library maintained by the AWS Cryptography team for AWS and their customers. It іs based on code from the Google BoringSSL project and the OpenSSL project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitdump/BLHeli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitdump/BLHeli
Language: assembly

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cRz-Shadows/Pokemon_Crystal_Legacy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cRz-Shadows/Pokemon_Crystal_Legacy
Language: assembly
This is a Pokémon Rom Hack made by TheSmithPlays with the intended purpose of fixing Pokémon Crystal into a more polished experience while staying true to the vision of Generation 2.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cRz-Shadows/Pokemon_Yellow_Legacy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cRz-Shadows/Pokemon_Yellow_Legacy
Language: assembly
This is a Pokémon Rom Hack made by TheSmithPlays with the intended purpose of fixing Pokémon Yellow into a more polished experience while staying true to the vision of Generation 1's Yellow.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chrislgarry/Apollo-11
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chrislgarry/Apollo-11
Language: assembly
Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cirosantilli/x86-bare-metal-examples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cirosantilli/x86-bare-metal-examples
Language: assembly
Dozens of minimal operating systems to learn x86 system programming. Tested on Ubuntu 17.10 host in QEMU 2.10 and real hardware. Userland cheat at: https://github.com/cirosantilli/linux-kernel-module-cheat#userland-assembly ARM baremetal setup at: https://github.com/cirosantilli/linux-kernel-module-cheat#baremetal-setup 学习x86系统编程的数十个最小操作系统。 已在QE…

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ebitengine/purego
Language: assembly

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openhwgroup/cva6
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openhwgroup/cva6
Language: assembly
The CORE-V CVA6 is a highly configurable, 6-stage RISC-V core for both application and embedded applications. Application class configurations are capable of booting Linux.

URL: https://github.com/pret/pokecrystal
